chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1764 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on M.A. No.6815/2022. 2. For orders on office objections appearing on reverse of memo of petition. 3. For orders on M.A. No.6816/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 24.05.2022 Mr. Ahmed Nawaz Chang, Advocate for the petitioners. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. The petitioners were claimed to be employees of MUSTANG respondent No.7 to whom some contracts were awarded by the Provincial Governments. These petitioners were only appointed on daily wages/temporary basis in the year 2019. Petitioners cannot enforce such contractual obligations against Government Officials. In so far as any enforcement of the contract against the private company is concerned, they may exhaust their remedy by approaching the forum having jurisdiction in this regard. Petition being misconceived is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
